caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the front, a black baseball cap with an embroidered logo, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and wears a gold chain. The background features a white wall with "BOSS HUSTLE" and star graphics, alongside a screen displaying the words "BOSS TALK 101." Overlaid on the bottom of the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man is seen speaking and shifting his gaze. Initially looking toward the left, he turns his head toward the center and then looks back toward the left, his mouth moving as he talks into the microphone. His posture remains relatively consistent as he engages in conversation.
